experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Owned end-to-end development of core e-commerce flows on busbud.com for ticket purchase and trip management.
Led delivery of the 'Cancel For Any Reason' ancillary product, expanding refund options and driving ancillary revenue.
Designed and maintained Node.js services using Domain-Driven Design; built performant React interfaces with Redux.
Improved reliability and regression coverage with Jest unit tests and Cypress E2E; optimized bundling with Webpack.
Partnered with product and design to scope, ship, and iterate on customer-facing features.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Delivered full-stack features for a large B2B retail data platform (Python services, React front end).
Introduced SonarQube with quality gates to improve code health and maintainability.
Led migration of the test suite from Mocha to Jest, reducing flakiness and standardizing tooling.
Initiated a developer book club to share best practices and architectural patterns (e.g., micro-frontends).

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built and shipped React Native mobile apps for clients including Ouigo and Sephora.
Defined project architecture and best practices; established CI/CD, static analysis, and automated testing.
Implemented GraphQL integrations and TypeScript-based shared components across iOS and Android.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
highlights: Built backend APIs (Node.js, Elixir) and frontend applications (Angular, React) for TAG-IP's core products.
Helped manage the development lifecycle end-to-end using Agile practices.
Introduced a CI/CD pipeline to replace manual deployments, improving release reliability and speed.

experience.title: Web Project Manager
highlights: Managed parallel CMS projects (Drupal, WordPress, Joomla) end-to-end.
Led a small development team, reviewed work, and ensured quality against client requirements.
Coordinated stakeholders and schedules to derisk dependencies and meet deadlines.

experience.title: Drupal Developer
highlights: Built Drupal websites, developing custom modules and themes.
Collaborated with an extended team using Git workflows for efficient code review and integration.

cover_letter_intro: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years building and scaling e-commerce and B2B platforms. I lead end-to-end delivery — architecture, implementation, and release — partnering with product and design to ship revenue-driving features and raise reliability through automated testing and CI/CD. Core stack: TypeScript, React/React Native, Node.js, Python, and GraphQL; cloud/devops with GCP, Kubernetes, and Terraform.
additional_notes:
Available for remote or hybrid roles. Open to both full-time and contract positions. No sponsorship required — EU citizen based in Paris.

AI Tools & Workflow: I leverage AI coding agents (OpenCode) to plan and build software efficiently. I use beads for task structuring (epics with subtasks, priorities, and dependencies) and emdash as a multi-agent orchestrator (uses git worktree for parallel work without interference). I also built a custom AI agent that automates my job applications end-to-end.
